sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60223" key="krumno/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῡμ-νός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῡμ-νώδης</orth>, dub. forms for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κρυμός, κρυμώδης</foreign> (qq. v.).</entryFree>
